title: Dimension Lock
description: Slow down progression and enjoy Minecraft as dimensions unlock over time instead of accessing them from the start.
body:
Ever hated the fact that everyone will speedrun the game at the start of a world? I have, so to stop that from happening I created my first datapack!

Walking into nether portals will now break them, and using eyes to find the stronghold will no longer work. To unlock the ability to access these dimensions, you must play out minecraft slowly and enjoy it slow. At day 10 the nether will be unlocked and at day 20 the end.

Go into the "load.mcfunction" file in the datapack to change how much time in ticks it will take to unlock these dimensions!
